name.comment: Short name or acronym of the catalogue (e.g. TPMC, GTDB, mOTUs-db).

description.comment: Free-text description of the database scope and content.

release.comment: Version or release identifier (e.g. r220, v3.1). Omit if unknown.

doi.comment: DOI or persistent URL of the associated publication or dataset, e.g. https://doi.org/10.1038/s41467-024-45895-8. Omit if unknown.

taxonomic_scope.comment: Taxonomic group(s) covered. Use NCBITaxon terms.

sample.label: Environmental Material
sample.comment: Environmental material sampled. Use ENVO subclasses: eg. liquid water, sediment, soil, fecal material ...

origin.label: located in
origin.comment: Location where samples were collected. Can be geographical (GAZ ontology), or describe hosts (NCBITaxon) : for example human (NCBITaxon:1060) for human skin or stool samples).

is_about.label: is about
is_about.comment: to describe databases not describable by sample and origin (e.g. databases of genomes specific to a metabolic pathway).

isPartOf.comment: Parent database or consortium (e.g. GlobDB extends GTDB, mOTUs-db ...).
